title: extra flowers

body:
# Simple mod with more flowers from real life for decoration

<center>

[![idono](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions)

</center>

---

<details>
<summary>Flower / Crops types</summary>

- Geranium
- Wisteria Vines
- Flax flower
- Verbena
- Hydrangea
- Lotus Flower
- ### And more
  
<details>
<summary>Orchid variation</summary>

- Pinkish-White Orchid 
- Vanilla Orchid*
- Blue Orchid

###### Plant
  
</details>



###### yes they are able to be put in a pot
</details>

<details>
<summary> Other Additions</summary>

- Bark Block
- Wisteria Tree
- Wisteria Sapling
- Wisteria Planks
- Wisteria Logs

</details>

### FAQ
---
**Q: Why Fabric not Forge ?**

**A:** **I´m lazy** and I might in the future port Fabric versions to Forge.

---
**Q: Can I port this to Bedrock edition ?**

**A:** **Yes**, but ask me for the permission before you do port my mod to Bedrock edition.

---
**Q: Can I put this mod to my modpack ?**

**A:** **Yes**, but please provide credit or link to my modrinth page.

---


###### @why_not_4_n0t
